## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss implementation of programmatic SEO pages for Vapi and resolve content publishing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic SEO pages will be built using Next.js app router, with each page as a singleton](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [First 2-3 pages will require more setup, then process can be automated for faster deployment](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Content team faced issues with GitHub/Vercel integration, now resolved](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Timeline: Aim for 2-3 pages done by end of next week, with demo/progress update by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

## Topics

### Programmatic SEO Page Implementation

  - [Pages will be built as singletons using Next.js app router](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Existing components and Tailwind CSS can be reused from current site](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [No need for Keystatic CMS integration initially; content can be hardcoded](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Will showcase real-time conversations with AI agents, not pre-recorded demos](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Different scenarios (transfer call, end call, recommend service) can be implemented using separate assistant configurations](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Development Process

  - [Clone repo, run locally, integrate Kirkland's existing demo](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Submit pull requests for review](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Look at existing singleton pages (e.g., startups, build challenge) for reference](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Automatically regenerating sitemap when adding new singletons](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### Vapi SDK Integration

  - [Can change assistant config by sending JSON](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Showcase developer-friendly features that highlight SDK capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Implement live transcript and mid-call control functionalities](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [Fixed GitHub and Vercel integration issue](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Content team can now publish directly through Keystatic without touching GitHub/Vercel](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
  - [Simple category/tag additions possible through config file edits](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcus: Set up local development environment, integrate existing demo](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Kirkland: Provide more details on conversation update events schema](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Matt: Test new publishing workflow, flag any issues](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=2349.0)
  - [Branko: Communicate timelines to client, facilitate daily updates](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [Team: Aim for demo/progress update by Monday, with 2-3 pages completed by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/Atrm2M2EHj9Zia7XCYDBXzQ_sy-UJ73a?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
